patterns.name: Hashing / Frequency
patterns.cue: Need O(1) lookup, counts, or 'seen before?' — reach for a hash map/set.

patterns.name: Prefix Sum
patterns.cue: Many range-sum queries, or subarray sums (especially with negatives).

patterns.name: Two Pointers
patterns.cue: Sorted array, or pair/triplet, or shrink-from-both-ends (palindrome, partition).

patterns.name: Sliding Window
patterns.cue: Contiguous subarray/substring with a longest/shortest/max-sum condition.

patterns.name: Fast & Slow Pointers
patterns.cue: Linked-list cycle, find middle, or detect a duplicate via cycle.

patterns.name: Linked List
patterns.cue: In-place pointer surgery: reverse, merge, reorder, k-group.

patterns.name: Binary Search
patterns.cue: Sorted input, OR 'minimize the max / maximize the min' (search on answer).

patterns.name: Monotonic Stack
patterns.cue: Next/previous greater-or-smaller element; histogram-style spans.

patterns.name: Stack / Simulation
patterns.cue: Matching pairs, undo, or evaluate left-to-right with a stack.

patterns.name: Tree DFS
patterns.cue: Recurse the tree; combine answers from left & right subtrees.

patterns.name: Tree BFS
patterns.cue: Level-by-level: level order, right-side view, shortest depth.

patterns.name: Trie
patterns.cue: Prefix queries, word dictionaries, autocomplete.

patterns.name: Heap / Top-K
patterns.cue: 'Top K', 'K closest', 'median of a stream', merge K sorted.

patterns.name: Backtracking
patterns.cue: All subsets/permutations/combinations; n is small (<= ~20).

patterns.name: Graph DFS/BFS
patterns.cue: Grids/graphs: connectivity, islands, flood fill, shortest unweighted path.

patterns.name: Topological Sort
patterns.cue: Ordering with prerequisites / dependencies in a DAG.

patterns.name: Union Find
patterns.cue: Dynamic connectivity, count components, detect cycle in undirected graph.

patterns.name: Shortest Path (weighted)
patterns.cue: Weighted edges: Dijkstra / Bellman-Ford / cheapest-within-K.

patterns.name: 1-D DP
patterns.cue: Optimal/count over a sequence with overlapping subproblems.

patterns.name: 2-D / Grid DP
patterns.cue: Two changing indices: strings, grids, knapsack-style tables.

patterns.name: Greedy
patterns.cue: Local optimal choice provably leads to global optimum (often after sorting).

patterns.name: Intervals
patterns.cue: Overlapping ranges: merge, insert, schedule, count rooms.

patterns.name: Matrix
patterns.cue: In-place grid manipulation: rotate, spiral, set-zeroes.

patterns.name: Math
patterns.cue: Number theory, digits, power, overflow tricks.

patterns.name: Bit Manipulation
patterns.cue: XOR cancellation, bit counting, subsets via bitmask.
